products.name: Redragon K552 Kumara TKL
products.description: 87-key tenkeyless mechanical keyboard with Outemu Blue switches. Metal alloy frame with anti-ghosting. Bright red LED backlight, 12 multimedia keys. Plug-and-play USB. Ideal for gaming and compact desk setups.

products.name: Havit HV-KB389L Full RGB Keyboard
products.description: Full-size 104-key mechanical keyboard with Per-key RGB backlight and 20 lighting effects. Low-profile slim switches with quiet actuation. Adjustable tilt stand. USB wired. Durable ABS keycaps.

products.name: Logitech MK270 Wireless Combo
products.description: Reliable wireless keyboard and mouse combo with 2.4GHz nano receiver. 24-month battery life. Quiet keys with spill-resistant design. Range up to 10 meters. Plug-and-play. Full-size layout.

products.name: Logitech G102 Lightsync RGB
products.description: Lightweight 85g gaming mouse with 200–8000 DPI optical sensor. 16.8M color LIGHTSYNC RGB. 6 programmable buttons with onboard memory. 32-bit ARM processor. USB 2.0 wired connection.

products.name: Redragon M711 Cobra RGB Gaming Mouse
products.description: 10000 DPI laser gaming mouse with adjustable weight tuning system. 7 programmable buttons. 16.8M RGB lighting across 7 independent zones. Durable braided cable. 5 DPI levels. Works on all OS.

products.name: Logitech G305 LIGHTSPEED Wireless
products.description: LIGHTSPEED wireless gaming mouse with HERO 12K sensor for incredible accuracy up to 12000 DPI. Ultra-lightweight 99g. Up to 250 hours battery life. 6 programmable buttons. 1ms report rate wireless.

products.name: Fantech HG20 Fusion 7.1 Headset
products.description: USB gaming headset with 7.1 virtual surround sound. 50mm neodymium drivers for deep bass and clear highs. Soft memory foam ear cushions. Retractable omnidirectional microphone. In-line volume control. RGB lighting.

products.name: Logitech G435 LIGHTSPEED Wireless
products.description: Ultra-lightweight 165g wireless headset with Bluetooth 5.1 and LIGHTSPEED 2.4GHz. 18-hour battery life. Built-in dual beamforming microphones. Eco-friendly recycled plastic. Multiplatform compatible.

products.name: Rapoo VH200 Stereo Gaming Headset
products.description: Stereo gaming headset with 3.5mm dual plug. 40mm drivers with clear highs and punchy bass. Soft adjustable headband. Flexible noise-canceling boom mic. Tangle-resistant flat cable. Works on PC, PS4, Xbox, Switch.

products.name: Philips 24E1N1300A 100Hz IPS Monitor
products.description: 23.8-inch Full HD IPS panel with 100Hz refresh rate and ultra-fast 4ms GtG response. HDMI 1.4 + VGA inputs. Eye comfort certified — TÜV flicker-free and LowBlue mode. Ultra-slim 7mm side bezels. Tilt-adjustable stand.

products.name: Havit MP907 XL RGB Desk Mousepad
products.description: Extended 900x400mm RGB gaming mousepad. USB-powered RGB LED edge lighting with 14 preset modes. Premium micro-woven cloth surface for precise tracking. Anti-slip natural rubber base. Machine washable surface.

products.name: SteelSeries QcK+ Gaming Mousepad
products.description: 450x400mm QcK cloth mousepad with micro-woven surface optimized for precise sensor tracking at any speed. Anti-fray stitched edges for long-term durability. Non-slip rubber base. Compatible with all mice.

products.name: Anker 7-Port USB 3.0 Data Hub
products.description: 7-port SuperSpeed USB 3.0 hub with 5Gbps data transfer. Backward compatible with USB 2.0 and 1.1. Individual LED power indicators per port. Compact aluminum housing. Bus-powered. Plug-and-play on Win/Mac/Linux.

products.name: Baseus 65W GaN Fast Charging Hub
products.description: 6-in-1 GaN desktop charging station. 1x USB-C 65W PD + 1x USB-C 45W + 4x USB-A 22.5W fast charge. Smart power distribution with thermal protection. LED indicator. Universal voltage input. Compact foldable plug.
